title: Privileged role assignments without MFA enforcement
remediation_summary: Require MFA and admin-focused conditional access for privileged identities.

title: Overprivileged accounts exceed least-privilege expectations
remediation_summary: Review privileged assignments and remove duplicate or unnecessary high-privilege access.

title: Stale service principals or credentials require review
remediation_summary: Rotate or remove stale service principal credentials and disable unused identities.

title: RBAC review cadence falls outside the expected governance window
remediation_summary: Establish a recurring access review process for privileged role assignments.

title: Identity governance observability is partial for this assessment scope
remediation_summary: Broaden tenant-level identity evidence collection before treating IAM coverage as complete.

title: Administrative services are exposed to the public internet
remediation_summary: Restrict SSH and RDP exposure with private access paths, VPN, or just-in-time controls.

title: Network security group rules are broader than expected
remediation_summary: Tighten overly permissive network rules to least-privilege source and port scopes.

title: Publicly reachable storage endpoints increase data exposure risk
remediation_summary: Disable public storage exposure and route sensitive services through private access patterns.

title: Private endpoint coverage is incomplete for sensitive services
remediation_summary: Extend private endpoints to sensitive services that should not rely on public routing.

title: Public storage access increases data exposure risk
remediation_summary: Disable anonymous or public storage access and review data exposure paths.

title: Data stores lack expected encryption protections
remediation_summary: Enable encryption at rest for affected storage and database services.

title: Backup and retention coverage fall below resilience expectations
remediation_summary: Increase backup and retention coverage for business-critical data stores.

title: Key management protections are incomplete for sensitive secrets
remediation_summary: Protect key-management services with MFA, purge protection, and stronger secret governance.

title: Activity log retention is below governance and investigation expectations
remediation_summary: Increase log retention to support investigation, governance review, and evidence preservation.

title: Critical security alert coverage is incomplete
remediation_summary: Add or expand critical alerts for administrative, exposure, and security events.

title: Security monitoring coverage is below the expected baseline
remediation_summary: Expand security monitoring coverage across workloads and key cloud services.

title: Monitoring operations are missing centralized logging or response runbooks
remediation_summary: Enable centralized logging and define response playbooks for priority events.

title: Critical workloads remain unpatched beyond acceptable risk tolerance
remediation_summary: Patch critical workloads and enforce a stronger recurring patch policy.

title: Endpoint protection coverage is below the expected workload baseline
remediation_summary: Deploy endpoint protection or security agents to uncovered workloads.

title: Workload hardening baseline coverage is incomplete
remediation_summary: Apply a hardened workload baseline across compute resources and administrative settings.

title: Workload backup agent coverage is below resilience expectations
remediation_summary: Enable workload backup protections for critical virtual machines and services.

title: Linux workloads allow password-based authentication over SSH
remediation_summary: Disable password-based SSH authentication and require stronger administrative access controls.

title: Resource tagging coverage falls below governance expectations
remediation_summary: Apply and enforce required resource tags across the environment.

title: Budget alerting is not enabled for cloud cost governance
remediation_summary: Configure budget thresholds and spend alerts for cost oversight.

title: Policy assignment coverage is below the baseline governance threshold
remediation_summary: Increase baseline policy assignment coverage for governance and compliance controls.

title: Orphaned resources increase governance and cost hygiene risk
remediation_summary: Review and remove unused or orphaned resources to reduce cost and governance noise.
